untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific indicators not in allowed list: (1) option moneyness/intrinsic value comparison, (2) option time value calculation, (3) dividend amount/ex-dividend date tracking, (4) American vs European style exercise logic. These require derivatives pricing data and corporate action calendars not available in equity price/technical indicators. Additionally, the signal is fundamentally an OPTIONS trading rule, not an equity/futures signal.
translation_notes: This signal cannot be translated to the equity backtester as it requires: call option moneyness detection, time value quantification relative to dividend payment, ex-dividend date proximity tracking, and exercise decision logic. These are derivative-specific calculations requiring options pricing models (Black-Scholes components) and corporate action data. The rule is event-driven around dividend ex-dates and requires real-time dividend amount knowledge, which is outside the scope of the allowed indicators (price action, moving averages, RSI, ATR, etc.).
